subcodes.title: Words to Madame Laheebe Hashem, spoken on 1913-10-24
subcodes.first_line: Be thou kind to all mankind. Try thy utmost to alleviate their burdens. Enlighten the minds with the light of knowledge.
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @love and unity, @role and station of women, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
